data.raceName: MOET & CHANDON QUEEN OF THE TURF STAKES
data.raceComments: {"comment":"The Group 1 Queen Of The Turf for mares is run over 1600m for a million dollars, and 2. LADY SHENANDOAH has not won for some time, and was fourth in the G1 George Ryder Stakes 3 weeks ago, after getting stirred up prior to the jump. JMac returns to the saddle, and she will be given every chance from a good gate. 3. TREASURETHE MOMENT let down strongly to score second up in the G2 Sunline Stakes at Caulfield 3 weeks ago. She is unbeaten racing in a clockwise direction, and she can repeat the dose. 1. PRIDE OF JENNI will give her supporters a great sight in front again, and she will be peaking third up from a spell. She can never be ruled out of winning. 8. IDLE FLYER showed a terrific turn of foot when scoring comfortably at Rosehill a fortnight ago in the G2 Emmancipation Stakes. She is still on the up, and has to be respected on an each-way basis. 6. LEICA LUCY has yet to truly recapture her brilliant NZ form, and she might want more ground than a mile, but don't risk her here.","runners":[2,3,1,8,6],"exclusive":true}
